briefs.title: Council to Consider: Burnaby Housing Authority Proposed 2026 Operating Budget
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to review the Burnaby Housing Authority's proposed 2026 operating budget. This budget outlines planned spending and revenue for the city's affordable housing programs for the coming year.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — this could affect affordable housing availability and costs in Burnaby.
